[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1101010 4
1 0111101 5
2 0101111 5
3 1011011 5
4 0000111 3
5 1100101 4
6 0010000 1
7 1011000 3

01 0000000 a

23 0000101 2
34 1000010 2

56 0100100 2
67 1011000 3 match 7
70 0000010 1
